_source: Lucks Air & Heat — 1 - RETRO ESTIMATING SHEET.xlsx, EQUIPMENT PRICING + PRICING WORKSHEET
_notes: All equipment prices extracted directly from Excel EQUIPMENT PRICING sheet.
All material prices extracted from Excel PRICING WORKSHEET.
Cross-referenced and verified against source. Every total = furnace + coil + condenser.
Shared coil models (ARUF/ASPT) have different prices under Amana vs Goodman — each package uses the correct brand price.

adders._note: Adder costs null = awaiting client confirmation.

default_bom._note: Materials cost estimates by tonnage and access difficulty. To be refined with real job data from PRICING WORKSHEET.

reducers.description: 3.5" X 10" Square to 5" Round Hoodvent Adapter

tier_brands._note: Maps Good/Better/Best tier names to system packages. Switch TIER_STRATEGY in pricing_engine.py.

amana_standard_eff._desc: Amana 80% AFUE single-stage / 14 SEER2 — base tier

amana_high_eff._desc: Amana 96% AFUE single-stage / 16 SEER2 — mid tier

amana_premium._desc: Amana 97% AFUE variable / 20+ SEER2 variable — premium tier
amana_premium._note: Only tonnages where all models exist in Excel. 1.5T/2.5T/3.5T condensers not available.

goodman_standard._desc: Goodman 80% AFUE multi-speed ECM / ~15 SEER — budget tier

goodman_high._desc: Goodman 96% AFUE multi-speed ECM / ~15 SEER — mid Goodman tier

goodman_premium._desc: Goodman 97% AFUE modulating variable / ~15 SEER — top Goodman tier
goodman_premium._note: No 1.5T variable furnace available for Goodman.

lennox_standard._desc: Lennox 80% AFUE ECM single-stage / 14 SEER — standard Lennox tier

lennox_high._desc: Lennox 96% AFUE variable / 17 SEER — high-eff Lennox tier

lennox_premium._desc: Lennox 99% AFUE variable / 25 SEER — premium Lennox tier
lennox_premium._note: SL25KCV condensers only available in 024/036/048/060 (2.0/3.0/4.0/5.0 ton).

trane_standard._desc: Trane 80% AFUE single-stage / 14 SEER — standard Trane tier

trane_mid._desc: Trane 80% AFUE enhanced single-stage / 15 SEER — mid Trane tier

trane_premium._desc: Trane 96% AFUE variable / 20+ SEER variable — premium Trane tier
trane_premium._note: 5TTV0 condensers only in 024/036/048/060. S9V2C100U5VSB at $3,965 per Excel (verify with distributor).

4.0._note: S9V2C100U5VSB cost $3,965 in Excel — unusually high vs 80k BTU at $1,982. Verify.

5.0._note: S9V2C100U5VSB cost $3,965 in Excel — unusually high vs 80k BTU at $1,982. Verify.
